error_signature: property names not displayed correctly for Chinese characters
title: Notion node fails to display Chinese property names
symptom: When using the Notion node, property names that are entirely in Chinese are not displayed correctly and appear as 'property_'.
applies_when: Property names are in Traditional Chinese
not_this_if: Error does not occur in other languages
root_cause: The Notion node has a known issue with handling non-Latin characters, leading to incorrect processing of property names that are entirely in Chinese. This results in all such properties being treated generically as 'property_'.
fix_steps: Modify the Chinese property names in Notion to include a number or Latin character (e.g., '中文1')
Retry using the Notion node in n8n
agent_instruction: Add a number or Latin character to your Chinese property names in Notion to ensure they are displayed correctly in n8n.
